name: nullius-hurricane-reskins
title: Nullius: Hurricane Reskins
author: brickbrycebrick
description: Reskins Nullius buildings with Hurricane046's high-resolution animated sprites, with tier coloring (yellow/red/blue) applied at load via tint masks. Building art by Hurricane046 (https://www.figma.com/proto/y1IQG08ZG2jIeJ5sTyF4MP/Factorio-Buildings), used under CC BY 4.0.
